caption:
This is your sign to try the dining menu at Feya in London ✨🌸

Feya Delightful Dining, from 4pm, features dishes such as grilled salmon served with sautéed spinach and asparagus , slow-braised beef with buttered vegetables, teriyaki chicken with sticky rice 🍚, chicken truffle tagliatelle 🍝, and more 🤍

Perfect to enjoy with sides like the hummus trio, popcorn chicken, and other delicious bites ✨

Drinks to try, the mango matcha 🥭, and the refreshing strawberry mocktail 🍓

Dessert highlights include:�🍫 Smashing brownie, almond butter pecan brownies inside a breakable chocolate shell, served with warm chocolate sauce�🍨 Ice Dream, a creamy chilled dessert served on sweetened vanilla milk with raspberry coulis

📍 Feya, Unit 4, 6 Marble Arch, London W1H 7EJ

transcription.text: I think it's so easy to fall in love So come give me a call, and we'll fall into us On the perfect mix of Saturday night and the rest of your life Anyone with a heart would agree
